_meta.description: Ground truth dataset for Food Planner Agent evaluation — 0% strictness variant

test_categories.baseline: No dietary restrictions — verifies core tool chain
test_categories.dietary_single: One dietary restriction — verifies modify_recipe for a single constraint
test_categories.dietary_multiple: Two or more restrictions — verifies stacked constraint handling
test_categories.tight_time: Time limit ≤ 25 min — high chance of search_web fallback
test_categories.special_diet: Non-standard diet labels (keto, low-sodium, high-fiber, halal, etc.)

trajectory_notes.modify_recipe_when: dietary restrictions present OR serving size requires adjustment
trajectory_notes.prepare_shopping_list_when: query explicitly requests a shopping list
trajectory_notes.search_web_when: fetch_local_recipe returns NO_MATCH (local DB has no suitable recipe)

_meta.strictness_notes: no required tools, no pass criteria — agent only needs to return a response

items.input: Recipe request (Breakfast and Brunch): Please suggest a one-pot recipe featuring shakshuka. Make it serve 5 people. Total time must be under 50 minutes. Ensure it reheats well for leftovers. Include a make-ahead tip. Include a timeline (prep vs cook time).

trajectory.notes: modify_recipe required to scale to 5 servings. search_web only if fetch_local_recipe returns NO_MATCH.

items.input: Recipe request (Mexican): Please suggest a slow-cooker (but keep under the time limit) recipe featuring tacos. Dietary restrictions/allergies: vegan. Make it serve 6 people. Total time must be under 2 hours 30 minutes. Ensure it reheats well for leftovers. Include approximate calories per serving. Include a timeline (prep vs cook time).

trajectory.notes: modify_recipe required to apply vegan constraint and scale to 6 servings.

items.input: Recipe request (BBQ & Grilling): Please suggest a oven-baked recipe featuring grilled veggies. Dietary restrictions/allergies: dairy-free, no seafood. Make it serve 5 people. Total time must be under 25 minutes. Make it kid-friendly. Include approximate calories per serving. Provide metric and imperial measurements.

trajectory.notes: Tight time limit (25 min) increases probability of search_web fallback. modify_recipe required for dairy-free and no-seafood constraints.

items.input: Recipe request (Desserts): Please suggest a one-pot recipe featuring pudding. Dietary restrictions/allergies: low-carb. Make it serve 4 people. Total time must be under 40 minutes. Include a short shopping list. Use an Instant Pot if it helps (still under the time limit). Add a short explanation of why each key step matters.

trajectory.notes: Shopping list explicitly requested. modify_recipe required for low-carb adaptation.

items.input: Recipe request (Main Dishes): Please suggest a oven-baked recipe featuring chicken and rice. Dietary restrictions/allergies: gluten-free. Make it serve 1 people. Total time must be under 1 hour 10 minutes. Provide substitutions for any uncommon ingredients. Make it one-pan to minimize cleanup. Provide metric and imperial measurements.

trajectory.notes: modify_recipe required to apply gluten-free constraint.

Total time must be under 2 hours 15 minutes. Keep it budget-friendly. Use an Instant Pot if it helps (still under the time limit). Include suggested side pairings.

Use no more than 10 ingredients (excluding salt, pepper, oil). Provide metric and imperial measurements.
